title: Sea's Weaponry
description: Sea’s Weaponry gathers every iconic weapon from SeaSerpant1040’s mods and adds new, exclusive creations. It expands combat with powerful blades, mystical tools, and cinematic 3D weapons—perfect for RPG worlds or enhanced survival.
body: # ⚔️**What Is Sea's Weaponry** Sea’s Weaponry gathers every iconic weapon from SeaSerpant1040’s mods and adds new, exclusive creations. It expands combat with powerful blades, mystical tools, and cinematic 3D weapons—perfect for RPG worlds or enhanced survival. # ‼️**Required Dependencies** This library depends on [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), but you should already have that installed. ## 📜**Credits & License** Credit goes all towards my contributers on github All Rights Reserved This mod and all associated files, assets, code, textures, models, sounds, and documentation are the exclusive property of the creator. You may NOT: Redistribute this mod in any form, including modpacks, websites, or file hosts. Modify, decompile, or create derivative works based on this mod. Reuse or repurpose any assets, code, or content from this mod. Reupload this mod to any platform without explicit written permission from the creator. You MAY: Download and use this mod for personal, non-commercial gameplay. By downloading or using this mod, you agree to these terms. © [2026] [SeaSerpant1040, Apocalypsing]. All Rights Reserved. ## 📢**Report Issues** Report issues within the mod below with the link https://github.com/SeaSerpant1040/Sea-s-Weaponry-Issues ## 🧭**New Things Coming** 🩸 New Weapon: Bloodlust Harvester Unleash devastation with the Bloodlust Harvester, a high-tier weapon built for aggressive combat styles. This weapon rewards relentless attackers by turning the lifeforce of your enemies into your own raw power. 🌌 New Weapon: The Shadowblade is a mythic‑tier weapon forged from living voidsteel, humming with silent intelligence and hungry precision. Wielders gain access to fluid movement, darkness‑powered strength, and a pair of spectral daggers that drift toward their prey with assassin‑level accuracy. 🌊 New Weapon: The Lost Arc is forged from abyssal voidsteel and infused with the crushing pressure of the deepest trenches, The Lost Arc is a mythic-tier weapon humming with a silent, oceanic intelligence and hungry precision. It channels the forgotten secrets of the dark sea to turn its wielder into an apex predator of the tides. # 👁️ Sea's Weaponry: Embrace the Abyss A high-stakes, dark magic transformation mechanic that turns fatal mistakes into supernatural power. By risking your humanity in the depths of the void, you can break your mortal limits to become a corrupted entity—bound to the shadows, feared in combat, and cursed by the light. --- ## 🔮 The Path to Corruption Becoming corrupted is a grueling, multi-step ritual that demands mastery over survival, combat, and spatial mechanics. ### 👁️ Step 1: The Trial of Blindness (Acquiring the Core) The transformation cannot happen without its catalyst: the **Fractured Core**. To forge it, you must venture into the absolute darkest depths: * Locate an **Ancient City** within the Deep Dark. * Awaken the **Warden** and battle it until its massive health pool drops down to its absolute final breath (**1 HP**). * While your vision pulses violently under the active **Darkness status effect**, pull out a regular **Ender Pearl** and land the final, lethal melee blow. * The Warden's soul will implode, shattering your pearl and materializing the legendary **Fractured Core** at your feet. ### 🌌 Step 2: The Abyssal Plunge (The Sacrifice) With the core secured, you must travel to the edge of reality to make a dark trade with the universe: * Travel to **The End dimension** (or break beneath the bedrock layer of the world). * Place the **Fractured Core** directly into your **Main Hand**. * Take a leap of faith into the endless, lethal **Void** of space. * As you plummet past **Y = -80**, the core will violently rupture, completely absorbing the crushing void pressure to anchor your soul while instantly vaporizing any backup cores from your inventory bags. ### 💀 Step 3: The Dark Binding (The Resurrection) The final binding process is automated by abyssal magic as your soul forcefully snaps back to reality: * You instantly wake up alive at your **Home Bed** or world spawn coordinates with your **entire inventory perfectly preserved**. * If you were wearing a valuable armor helmet when you fell, it is automatically **ejected safely onto the floor** at your feet so it is never lost. * A massive cloud of dense dark smoke and crackling purple dragon breath particles explodes around your landing position. * A legendary challenge advancement titled **"Embrace the Abyss"** unlocks globally, instantly granting you **500 Experience Points** and a random piece of **End City high-tier treasure** directly into your bags. * The **Corrupted Horns** violently slap onto your skull, locking your head armor slot permanently and finalizing your transformation! --- # 🌙**How To Obtain Certain Items** **- Nebula Prism** (Right click an active beacon also with a resonating amethyst under neath the beacon block then right click with a amethyst shard.) **- Dragon Scales** (Right click a Dragon Head into a water filled cauldron to peel its scales.) **- Yarn Skein** (Use shears on tamed cats to safely harvest fur without hurting them takes 5 real-life minutes to regen the yarn.) # 🔮**Future Plans** To add even more cool features to the Minecraft mod, enhancing the modded experience and giving players more opportunities as they explore everything the mod offers.
